title: Adam and Eve in the Garden

scenes.narration: God made a beautiful garden. Every tree, every flower, every creature. Perfect.
scenes.image_prompt: Lush paradise garden with colorful flowers, fruit trees, waterfalls, and peaceful animals, golden warm sunlight, bright colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Then God made Adam. And from Adam, He made Eve. The very first two people.
scenes.image_prompt: Adam and Eve standing happily together in a beautiful garden surrounded by flowers and friendly animals, bright colorful bible storybook illustration, joyful wholesome mood

scenes.narration: God gave them one rule. Don't eat the fruit from this one tree. Just one.
scenes.image_prompt: Adam and Eve looking up at a single tall tree with glowing forbidden fruit, God's golden light pointing at the tree, bright colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Everything was perfect. Until a sneaky serpent slithered up to Eve.
scenes.image_prompt: Sneaky colorful serpent coiled around a tree branch whispering to Eve, Eve looking surprised and curious, bright colorful bible storybook illustration, slightly tense mood

scenes.narration: Did God really say that? the serpent hissed. Go on. Take a bite.
scenes.image_prompt: The serpent offering Eve a glowing piece of fruit with a clever expression, Eve looking hesitant, colorful bible storybook illustration, warm garden lighting

scenes.narration: Eve took one bite. Then Adam did too. And everything changed.
scenes.image_prompt: Adam and Eve both biting into the forbidden fruit with worried eyes, the garden around them beginning to darken slightly, dramatic colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: They had broken the one rule. And for the first time ever — they felt ashamed.
scenes.image_prompt: Adam and Eve hiding behind leafy bushes looking guilty and sad, the garden still beautiful but tinged with cooler shadows, colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: God loved them even then. But they had to leave the perfect garden.
scenes.image_prompt: Adam and Eve walking out of the garden gates hand in hand, an angel standing at the entrance with a glowing sword, golden sunset light, colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: One choice changed everything. But even after the mistake — God had a plan to bring people home.
scenes.image_prompt: Adam and Eve walking into a new sunrise together with hope on their faces, God's golden light shining down on them from above, warm colorful bible storybook illustration
